anchors.candidate_prompt_zh: 你是resident，现在在 Ohrid 地图。后续从选定起点出发，走到 DHL 的 civic_service_entrance，完成“access_civic_service”。路线应优先利用可见的 street_to_building_entrance；到达后停在清晰可截图的入口、边界或路径位置。不要飞行、传送、破坏方块，也不要把未验证地点当成已认证 POI。
anchors.mc_alignment_action: Use the live VNC view and endpoint screenshot evidence to mark PASS, MODIFY, or REJECT. Edit MC coordinates before teleporting to a corrected point.
anchors.mc_alignment_note: This point comes from the 12-map OSM anchor-selection/provisional-capture lane. It is a synchronization target for review only.

claim_boundary: Dynamic review anchors are teleport/screenshot synchronization aids only. They do not approve exact anchors, complete endpoint screenshots, certify routes, run no-model replay, or admit benchmark tasks.
